reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: No substantive comments from David Hildenbrand in the thread.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch series adds a new NFSD_CMD_CACHE_FLUSH generic netlink command to allow userspace to flush nfsd export caches without writing to /proc/net/rpc/*/flush. The command takes an optional u32 attribute to select which caches to flush, and falls back to the /proc-based cache_flush() for older kernels.
